name: Bugsnag Error Spike Page
description: Listens for Bugsnag error-rate spike webhooks configured at greater than 5x baseline, then grabs the offending release SHA and a sample stack trace from the event payload. Fans out a PagerDuty incident, a Slack alert in the on-call channel with the trace, and a Linear bug ticket assigned to the on-call engineer. Replaces tribal-knowledge incident response with a deterministic page and audit trail.
